steps.title: Identify what the two films share
steps.content: The notes establish that The Dungeon and The Fighting Ranger are both lost silent films from the 1920s, while also stating that silent films can be valuable historical documents. The question asks which choice emphasizes this similarity.

steps.title: Match the similarity to the choices
steps.content: Choice D combines the opening claim about valuable documents with the statement that “both silent films are lost,” placing both films in parallel. The other choices either address only one film (C), omit the films (B), or state isolated biographical details (A). This matches choice D — D is correct.
